Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface ListValidator<L extends List<E>,E>

Type Parameters:
L - the type of the list
E - the type of elements in the list
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleCollectionValidator<ListValidator<L,E>,L,E>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<ListValidator<L,E>,L>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ListValidatorImpl
public interface ListValidator<L extends List<E>,E> extends ExtensibleCollectionValidator<ListValidator<L,E>,L,E>
Validates the requirements of a List.

All methods (except those found in ExtensibleObjectValidator) imply ExtensibleObjectValidator.isNotNull().

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ListValidator<L,E>
    isSorted(Comparator<E> comparator)
    Ensures that the actual value is sorted.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleCollectionValidator

    asArray, asArray, contains, contains, containsAll, containsAll, containsAny, containsAny, containsExactly, containsExactly, doesNotContain, doesNotContain, doesNotContainAll, doesNotContainAll, doesNotContainAny, doesNotContainAny, doesNotContainDuplicates, doesNotContainExactly, doesNotContainExactly, isEmpty, isNotEmpty, size, size

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectValidator

    asString, asString, getActual, getFailures, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • isSorted

      ListValidator<L,E> isSorted(Comparator<E> comparator)
      Ensures that the actual value is sorted.
      Parameters:
      comparator - the comparator that defines the order of the elements
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      See Also:
      • Comparator.naturalOrder()
